meta.description: Performs logical operations (AND, OR, XOR, Timer, Flip-Flop) on digital inputs.

inputs.description: Secondary Logic Input (Ignored if CD is 6-8)

0.name: AND
0.description: Output ON when both inputs are ON

1.name: OR
1.description: Output ON when at least one input is ON

2.name: EOR
2.description: Output ON when inputs are different

4.name: RESET-PRIO-FF
4.formula: IF Z2 THEN Y=0 ELSE IF Z1 THEN Y=1

5.name: SET-PRIO-FF
5.formula: IF Z1 THEN Y=1 ELSE IF Z2 THEN Y=0

meta.description: Detects 0->1 change in inputs Z1-Z3 to switch loop status (C/A/M).

logic.name: Priority Switch
logic.formula: IF RisingEdge(Z1) THEN Status=C ELSE IF RisingEdge(Z2) THEN Status=A ELSE IF RisingEdge(Z3) THEN Status=M

meta.description: Analog input processing including linearization, instrument check, alarms (HH/LL/PH/PL), rate limit and filtering.

check.name: Instrument Check
check.formula: IF X1>KH OR X1<KL THEN IE=1

correction.name: Linearization
correction.formula: IF CD=1 THEN Y=SQRT(X1) ELSE Y=X1

alarm.name: Alarm Check
alarm.formula: IF Y>HH THEN HH=1; IF Y>PH THEN PH=1; IF Y<PL THEN PL=1; IF Y<LL THEN LL=1

meta.description: Calculates the square root of the analog input (Y = Sqrt(X) + C), used for differential pressure flow linearization.

parameters.description: Cutoff Value (Output = C if Input < N)

sqrt.name: Square Root
sqrt.formula: IF X1 < N THEN Y=C ELSE Y=SQRT(X1)+C

meta.description: Calculates the deviation (DV) between PV and SV, supporting Cascade SV, PV Tracking, and Deviation Alarms.

select.name: SV Selection
select.formula: IF Z1=1 THEN SV=PV ELSE IF CasMode THEN SV=X2 ELSE SV=LocalSV

calc.name: Deviation
calc.formula: IF Direct THEN Y=PV-SV ELSE Y=SV-PV

alarm.name: Dev Alarm
alarm.formula: IF Y>DH THEN DH=1; IF Y<DL THEN DL=1

meta.name_zh: 偏差輸入 PID 運算器
meta.description: Performs Positional PID control calculation based on deviation input.

sep.name: Integral Separation
sep.formula: IF X1>DRH OR X1<DRL OR Z2=1 THEN Hold Integral

meta.description: Clamps the analog input signal between a High Limit (C1) and a Low Limit (C2).
Final processing for loop output, including High/Low limits, Rate limits, and Mode handling.

limit.name: Output Constraints
limit.description: Applies physical constraints to the control signal

meta.description: Detects 4 alarm levels (2 High, 2 Low) for an analog input.

compare.name: Comparator
compare.formula: Check if X > HSn or X < LSn

meta.description: Performs linear combination of 4 inputs: Y = K1*X1 + K2*X2 + K3*X3 + K4*X4 + C

parameters.description: Calculation Code (0: Include Negative, 1: Ignore Negative)

meta.description: Performs multiplication and division of analog inputs (Y = K * X1 * X2 / X3 + C).
Selects the Maximum, Minimum, or Median value from up to 3 analog inputs.

select.name: Selection Logic
select.formula: Switch(CD) {Case 0: Min; Case 1: Mid; Case 2: Max}

meta.name_zh: 附開關多點常數產生器
meta.description: Outputs one of 5 constants (C1-C5) based on digital inputs Z1-Z4 with priority logic.
Selects one of 4 analog inputs (X1-X4) or a constant (C) based on digital selection signals.
Generates a linear ramp signal from C1 to C2 with a defined slope (ALFA).

inputs.description: Start/Reset (0: Reset to C1, 1: Start Ramp)

ramp.name: Linear Ramp
ramp.formula: Y(t) = C1 + ALFA * t (Limited at C2)

meta.description: Integrates an analog rate signal over time to calculate the totalized quantity with Start/Hold control.

outputs.trigger: Triggered when Accumulator increments by BT

parameters.description: Low Cutoff Value (Deadband for Zero Flow)

integrate.name: Time Integration
integrate.logic: Check Z2(Hold): If ON, Y=Y(n-1). Else Check Z1(Start): If OFF, X_effective=0. Else If X1 < C, X_effective=0. Else X_effective=X1.

pulse_generation.name: Pulse Trigger
pulse_generation.logic: If (Y_current - Y_last_pulse) >= BT, Then Output Pulse & Update Y_last_pulse

meta.description: Writes the value of input X to a specified parameter (DTYP) based on trigger Z.

parameters.description: Target Data Type (e.g., SV, P, I)

meta.description: Performs temperature, pressure, and density compensation for flow measurement based on ideal gas laws.
Performs non-linear function characterization using an 8-point piecewise linear curve.

meta.name_zh: 一次延遲+無效時間運算器
meta.description: Simulates a first-order lag process with dead time (G(s) = K/(1+Ts) * exp(-Ls)).
Implements the Smith Predictor algorithm to compensate for process dead time.
Implements Lead/Lag compensation for feedforward control.

meta.name_zh: 附 Gain 不感帶運算器
meta.description: Applies different gains to the signal depending on whether it is inside or outside a specified dead band.
Generates an 8-segment time-based program pattern (Ramp/Soak profile).
Ramps the output between C2 (Stop) and C1 (Start) over specified times T1 and T2.

ramp.name: Soft Start/Stop
ramp.formula: Linear Ramp Up/Down based on Z1 state

meta.description: Calculates the moving average of the last N1 samples to smooth out signal noise.

meta.name_zh: 最大/最小/平均值運算器
meta.description: Calculates the Maximum, Minimum, or Average value of an input signal over a period.

stat.name: Statistics
stat.formula: Updates Max/Min/Avg buffer on each cycle

meta.description: Calculates the rate of change of the input signal and triggers alarms if it exceeds limits.
Calculates a target value based on a master signal and a ratio setting (Y = K * Ratio * X1 + C).
Performs 2-position or 3-position ON-OFF control with hysteresis.

onoff.name: Hysteresis Switch
onoff.formula: Switch State based on Thresholds +/- Hysteresis

meta.name_zh: 時間比例 ON-OFF 調節器
meta.description: Converts an analog input (0-100%) into a time-proportional ON/OFF signal (PWM).

meta.name_zh: 溫度補正附脈衝積算計
meta.description: Totalizes pulse inputs with temperature-based density compensation.
Controls batch loading with two-stage valve shutoff (Main/Sub) for precision.

batch.name: Two-Stage Control
batch.formula: Main=OFF when Rem < DSV; Sub=OFF when Rem <= 0

meta.description: Manages multiple batch recipes (SV) and collects results for the Batch Counter (F32).

recipe.name: Recipe Manager
recipe.formula: Write SVn to F32.BT based on Zn

meta.name_zh: 單迴路控制器通訊區塊
meta.description: Establishes standard communication (PV, SV, MV, PID) with an external one-loop controller.

comm.name: Data Mapping
comm.description: Syncs standard control data with external device

meta.description: Reads and writes specific analog data (Word) to/from an external controller using data codes.
Reads and writes specific digital data (Bit) to/from an external controller using data codes.
Downloads a set of recipe parameters (Grade Data) based on the input grade code.
Manages a FIFO queue of grade codes for scheduled production.
Advanced program pattern generator supporting up to 16 segments and batch trend integration.
Controls a motor-operated valve using digital Open/Close pulses based on position feedback.
Calculates pulse width values for smart I/O modules (e.g., PPO610) to control motor valves.
Integrated PID controller with deviation calculation, cascade input, and PV tracking.
Detects signal changes (edges) for a group of digital inputs and provides individual and combined outputs.

detect.name: Edge Detection
detect.formula: Check N points for edge; Output One-shot

meta.description: Calls and executes a specified SLC-BLS program (Equation) from the DDC loop.
Executes a logic diagram (Control Condition) defined in SLC-SEQ within the DDC loop.

meta.name_zh: デジウェイ通信ブロック
meta.description: Converts special data formats (Pulse, BCD) received via PIW640 module.
Triggers batch data collection and reporting to the upper-level system (POC/SOC).
Operates a motor valve with Open, Stop, and Close commands, including status feedback and stall checking.
Generates a digital output signal at a specific scheduled time (Hourly, Daily, Monthly, etc.).

meta.name_zh: 簡易型警報一括出力運算器
meta.description: Combines up to 7 alarm inputs (OR logic) to trigger a common alarm output.
Holds the output value at the last good value or a constant when the input is abnormal or a hold command is received.
Converts BCD digital inputs into a binary/analog value with scaling.
Converts an analog value into BCD format digital outputs.
Saves the current system time (MMDD, HHMM) to a specified GL register upon a trigger event.
Performs a sequence of up to 8 arithmetic operations (Add, Sub, Mul, Div, Sqrt) on inputs X1-X4.

meta.name_zh: データー一括収集演算器
meta.description: Collects data from up to 7 specified loops and stores them into consecutive GL registers.
Generates up to 4 channels of intermittent (flickering) digital signals with programmable ON/OFF times.
Generates a digital output signal daily at a specific hour and minute.
